Heavyweight+

Heavyweight and above (Over 210.0 lbs) fighter ranks

The rankings presented are computerized and provided by the FightMatrix ranking system, which utilizes a comprehensive MMA fight database to provide objective rankings. Please note, that these rankings ONLY contain fighters who have had at least one professional fight some time in the 450 days prior to the ranking date.

Issue Date: 5/10/2026 (Official Release: #1023)
Rating Formula:

16 thoughts on “Heavyweight+”

  1. Skylar Cherrey says:
    April 18, 2026 at 5:03 pm

    I’m ready to fight

    Reply
  2. Audrey Ngasseufa says:
    August 10, 2025 at 11:53 am

    Je ne comprends pas pourquoi Cyril est classé devant Francis et Aspinall (Deux champions) pourtant il a perdu deux combats pour le titre. Même son dernier combat contre Volkov était un vol. Dana lui-même l’a reconnu après le match. Du pur n’importe quoi ce classement.

    Oumar Kane mérite entrer dans le top 10.

    Reply
  3. Rahmat says:
    June 12, 2025 at 11:18 pm

    Why Jon Jones is #1 , After Beating [NR] Stipe Miocic

    Reply
  4. Rahmat says:
    April 3, 2025 at 3:28 pm

    Why Francis is Ranked lower than jon jones, he should be Numer 1 Ranked ?
    He was Number 1 Ranked when he left UFC?
    What Pfl fighters need to do be number 1 in this list.

    Reply
    1. Jason says:
      April 3, 2025 at 3:43 pm

      Stay active and beat top competition.

      Reply
  5. Juice says:
    November 12, 2024 at 3:05 am

    How is Jon not on here as UFC HW champ and I don’t even like him.

    Reply
    1. oleg says:
      November 13, 2024 at 9:16 am

      Inactivity.

      Reply
  6. Ozymandias says:
    November 2, 2024 at 6:32 pm

    Why do you feel the need to be disrespectful?

    Reply
  7. Jmo says:
    October 19, 2024 at 7:21 pm

    Where is One on the these lists??? Malkyln better than at least half of these guys.

    Reply
    1. oleg says:
      October 20, 2024 at 12:01 am

      https://www.fightmatrix.com/mma-ranks/heavyweight-265-lbs/?RF=FM&OrgFilter=One+Fighting+Championship&NatFilter=&OrgFilter2=&AgeFromFilter=&AgeToFilter=&TeamFilter=&StateFilter=

      October 20, 2024 at 12:03 am

      Malykhin is ranked at LHW.

      Reply
      1. Austin Petti says:
        November 12, 2024 at 3:53 am

        I WAS only making a joke I had no idea… u can call me the mediocre MT guy

        Reply
  8. Arash says:
    April 10, 2024 at 3:58 am

    Why you should be ranked? So far, you are a mediocre fighter with a terrible record and level of opposition at the moment.

    Reply
    1. Austin Petti says:
      November 12, 2024 at 3:39 am

      hey there is no reason to pick on being mediocre I wish someone said that to me

      Reply
